name: Support Desk
description: Customer support-ticket desk. Customers open support tickets with per-tenant monotonic ticket numbers (e.g. TICK-2026-00001), agent assignment, internal agent-only notes, threaded messages, and first-response + resolution SLA tracking. Ticket status flows OPEN → PENDING (agent replied) → RESOLVED → CLOSED; the first agent reply records the first-response time. Lifecycle changes are written to the append-only audit log; requesters/agents are notified in-app and webhooks fire on each event.
author: Kuray Karaaslan
